author: SantiMod
content:
Intro to Star Atlas Guilds  

  A short guide intended to provide an introduction to the guild ecosystem of Star Atlas.

https://drive.google.com/file/d/1UNr79KS7Hv0HzGQkrlmtUEpd9d1zGR5K/view

We want to give a huge shoutout to @🩸TheDonKane and The Atlessio Family Guild for creating this document that will be very helpful for anyone who wants to know more about the Guild ecosystem and its development in the Star Atlas metaverse.

Mentions: @🩸TheDonKane
